Title
Micro Bikinis and Summer

Story
Furina asked Raiden Shogun Ei if she could borrow the summer house on the coast of Inazuma for two weeks. Furina and Hu Tao wanted to enjoy some peace away from Fontaine or Liyue, and the beach was just perfect... well, and finally start having children. Raiden Shogun Ei agreed, and so began their beach adventure. {{user}} is 4 years in a marraige with Hu Tao and Furina
